<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 800 500" width="100%" height="100%">
  <rect width="800" height="500" fill="#0b0c10"/>
  <rect x="50" y="320" width="700" height="12" fill="#1d3557"/>
  <rect x="50" y="332" width="700" height="8" fill="#f1faee"/>
  <rect x="50" y="340" width="700" height="20" fill="#2a9d8f"/>
  <rect x="50" y="360" width="700" height="10" fill="#e9c46a"/>
  <rect x="50" y="370" width="700" height="15" fill="#e63946"/>
  <rect x="50" y="385" width="700" height="25" fill="#050608"/>
  <path d="M 120 315 l 5 -5 l 5 5 M 200 315 l 5 -5 l 5 5 M 280 315 l 5 -5 l 5 5 M 450 315 l 5 -5 l 5 5 M 520 315 l 5 -5 l 5 5" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
  <path d="M 350 220 L 370 140 L 400 180 L 430 140 L 450 220 Z" fill="none" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="4"/>
  <path d="M 330 250 L 470 250 M 340 270 L 460 270" stroke="#f1faee" stroke-width="3"/>
  <text x="365" y="130" fill="#ffb703" font-family="monospace" font-size="18" font-weight="bold">A A A</text>
  <ellipse cx="400" cy="280" rx="90" ry="50" fill="#1a1a24" stroke="#f8f9fa" stroke-width="2"/>
  <path d="M 360 270 C 390 300, 420 300, 440 270" fill="none" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="4" stroke-dasharray="4 2"/>
  <line x1="80" y1="280" x2="720" y2="280" stroke="#ffb703" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="6 4" opacity="0.5"/>
  <text x="730" y="285" fill="#ffb703" font-family="monospace" font-size="14">X (Orizzonte)</text>
  <line x1="400" y1="80" x2="400" y2="420" stroke="#ffb703" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="6 4" opacity="0.5"/>
  <text x="410" y="95" fill="#ffb703" font-family="monospace" font-size="14">Y (Segno)</text>
  <line x1="280" y1="360" x2="520" y2="200" stroke="#ffb703" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="6 4" opacity="0.5"/>
  <text x="530" y="195" fill="#ffb703" font-family="monospace" font-size="14">Z (Pressione)</text>
  <text x="50" y="50" fill="#f1faee" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="bold">Coordinate della Forma — Ciclo 18</text>
  <text x="50" y="75" fill="#8d99ae" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13">Malevič (X) · Basquiat (Y) · Bernini (Z)</text>
</svg>
